title: CMR-0001: Camera object placement issue
content:
# CMR-0001: Camera object placement issue

A saved object could still be detected as being on the board after being moved through the camera workflow.

Status: Tracked

title: CMR-0002: Camera object reload issue
content:
# CMR-0002: Camera object reload issue

Some objects saved through Camera could not be opened or restored reliably.

Status: Tracked

title: IXO-0001: Canvas Builder editing issue
content:
# IXO-0001: Canvas Builder editing issue

UI elements built in Canvas Builder sometimes could not be selected or edited after generation.

Status: Fixed
